arts.sum: An insight into the expected absence awaiting Barcelona star Andreas Christensen over the weeks ahead has on Saturday been forthcoming. The name of defender Christensen has of course returned to…

arts.ttl: Ansu misses Barca training ahead of Real Sociedad clash
arts.sum: Ansu Fati is having a tough time at Barcelona this season and looks set to miss out once again on Sunday when Hansi Flick’s side take on Real Sociedad in La Liga. The forward missed training on Saturday with a fever and it seems likely he won’t be part of the squad once again for the match against Imanol Alguacil’s side.

arts.ttl: Man United wonderkid 'wanted by Barcelona' as Catalan giants 'look to take advantage' of English club's financial concerns
arts.sum: Barcelona are allegedly interested in signing Manchester United attacker Alejandro Garnacho during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star names Real Madrid attacker as toughest opponent he has ever faced

arts.ttl: Barcelona star sits out training before Real Sociedad clash
arts.sum: A member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona played no part in group training with the rest of the club’s squad on Saturday. That’s according to Diario…

arts.ttl: Key Barcelona star expected to drop out of XI to face Real Sociedad
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona is expected to be afforded a rest in the club’s next outing. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: ‘It’s a difficult question’ - Flick admits to selection headache over De Jong and Casadó
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick is facing quite the selection headache at the moment when it comes to Pedri’s partner in the double pivot of his midfield, with both Marc Casadó and Frenkie de Jong deserving of a chance to start and play big minutes. Hansi has certainly leaned towards the offensive upgrade Frenkie offers in the last month or so, but after conceding quite a few goals in big games recently the coach might also consider inserting Casadó back into the lineup to try and achieve more defensive balance.

arts.ttl: Flick offers update on Szczesny’s future amid contract extension talk
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczesny had to wait quite a while to replace Iñaki Peña as Barcelona’s number one goalkeeper due to Marc-André ter Stegen’s injury, but the Pole has certainly become the undisputed starter with his performances since being inserted into the lineup at the start of the new year. Szczesny has been so good in fact that there’s already talk about him sticking around for another year, and signing a contract extension to become Ter Stegen’s backup when the German returns from injury next season.

arts.ttl: Vitor Roque: Total cost of Barcelona exit revealed
arts.sum: The full finances involved in Vitor Roque's transfer from Barcelona to Palmeiras have been revealed.

arts.ttl: Real Sociedad could be without 8 players for Barcelona clash
